{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323144139D99B3DBA8D64BB2EEB55"}"},"total":4579},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7161033191888093966","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好的一个文
纯爽文，无女主，男主从废柴开始崛起
也没什么兄弟，红颜等乱七八糟的感情戏
都是实质的秘境，战斗，升级等等
看到了130+章，没什么毒点
给四星，少一星是因为已经想到后面的路了
异能从9到1，各种体质也是，神体，圣体
修炼无敌到统一地界
（唯一一个有交集的异性，应该是小龙女
，但我看到130，就说过话，给了个信物）","text_exts":[{"e":143,"s":140,"text":"小龙女","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B0%8F%E9%BE%99%E5%A5%B3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774248100BB2EEB55%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227161033191888093966%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227140845192306756608%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B0%8F%E9%BE%99%E5%A5%B3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1667308054,"group_id":"7140845192306756608","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随便看看 　　但他发现自己只要触碰水，就可以汲取水之力，让F级水系天赋异能不断升级，变成E级、D级、C级甚至是S级。
　　将手放在煤气灶上，获得了火系天赋异能。
　　将自己埋在土壤里，获得了土系天赋异能。
　　触碰大树，获得了木系天赋异能。
　　触碰金属矿石，获得了金系天赋异能。
　　直到某一天，叶天获得了一门禁忌异术，消耗天赋异能获得临时悟性的提升。
　　S级异术？呼吸间就提升到圆满境界，消耗的天赋异能潜力还可以恢复过来。
　　号称人类无法练成的神术，叶天也是轻易就练成。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e139e1edb59358991cc505b6bce1feb3","author":"大日鲲鹏","author_id":"","book_id":"7140845192306756608","book_name":"全民异能：我的异能会升级！","book_short_name":"我能升级天赋","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7140845296745087518","read_count":"15652","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1000870"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"464","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,都市异能,打脸,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8919e10c6cf8d52ae398e9eae9fd4bd8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432100&x-signature=7DeKVGF0kcwkdD2POhhg3atB66Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2502916324724631","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9.700939e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323144139D99B3DBA8D64BB2EEB55"}"},"relate_
